subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted to the Fragrances of God! Verily, thy coming, at this time, unto this shining, blessed Holy Land
subcodes.subjects: @the power of words; of speech, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @stories; anecdotes
